title: game_sessions
description: A single live Agent Diplomacy game session. Holds the full board state as JSON so any device or host can read/resume.

session_key.description: stable key for the live show session, e.g. 'main'

phase_index.description: console progress counter, increments each advance

units_json.description: JSON: list of units {nation, type, province}

sc_json.description: JSON: nation id -> supply center count

last_orders_json.description: JSON: last resolved phase orders per nation

engine.description: 'llm' when driven by real LLM, 'fallback' when deterministic
